messages.content: Write a resume summary for Marisol Ferrante, a Senior Revenue Manager in travel. Use only these facts: she rebuilt the length-of-stay pricing rules for ski-season inventory, lifting RevPAR 9.4% year over year; she reduced overbooking write-offs 34% by tightening the no-show model with two years of arrival data; and she caught a channel-parity break across two OTA partners that had been leaking an estimated $380K annually.

Senior Revenue Manager with a record of measurable pricing wins in travel. Rebuilt length-of-stay pricing rules for ski-season inventory, lifting RevPAR 9.4% year over year. Cut overbooking write-offs 34% by tightening the no-show model with two years of arrival data, and caught a channel-parity break across two OTA partners that had been leaking an estimated $380K annually.
